landing.heroDescription: Scan your code for security issues with static analysis and AI-powered explanations developers can actually understand.
landing.publicScanHint: Scan any public GitHub repository — no sign-in required
landing.whyVexlitDescription: Enterprise-grade security scanning with the simplicity of a single command.
landing.securityRulesDescription: Comprehensive coverage across injection, secrets, crypto, and more.
landing.moreRules: + 70 more SAST rules and 200+ secret detectors
landing.ctaDescription: Connect your GitHub repository and get a comprehensive security scan in seconds. Free to use.

features.astAnalysisDesc: Hybrid regex + AST scanning with tree-sitter for JavaScript, TypeScript, and Python reduces false positives by understanding code structure.
features.sastRulesDesc: Covers OWASP Top 10 including SQL Injection, XSS, SSRF, Command Injection, Prototype Pollution. Plus 200+ secret detectors.
features.githubIntegrationDesc: One-click repo scanning. SARIF output for GitHub Code Scanning. Results appear directly in your Security tab.
features.aiVerificationDesc: Claude AI secondary analysis filters false positives, explains vulnerabilities in detail, and suggests code fixes.
features.scanHistoryDesc: Track vulnerability trends over time with visual charts. See your security posture improve with each commit.
features.freeOpenSourceDesc: CLI and core engine are open source. Use locally, in CI/CD, or through the web dashboard. MIT licensed.

sections.beforeAfterDesc: See how VEXLIT catches vulnerabilities that manual review misses.
sections.scanOutputDesc: Real terminal output from scanning a Node.js project.
sections.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to secure your code.
sections.step1Desc: Link your GitHub repository with one click. Public or private, we scan it all.
sections.step2Desc: 85+ SAST rules and 200+ secret detectors analyze your code using AST-based static analysis in seconds.
sections.step3Desc: Get actionable fix suggestions with code examples. AI explains each vulnerability clearly.
sections.jsTsDesc: Full AST analysis with tree-sitter and @typescript-eslint.
sections.pythonDesc: Tree-sitter AST parsing for Python-specific vulnerability patterns.
sections.secretsAllDesc: 200+ patterns detect API keys across any file type.
sections.comparisonDesc: See how we stack up against other security tools.

scans.subtitle: All scan history across your projects

publicScan.ctaTitle: Want AI explanations, trend tracking, and more?
publicScan.ctaDesc: Sign in to get AI-powered fix suggestions, scan history, and continuous monitoring.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Please review and accept our terms to continue
onboarding.termsAgree: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
onboarding.marketingAgree: I agree to receive product updates and security tips via email (optional)
onboarding.setupSubtitle: Configure repository access and automation features
onboarding.repoAccessDesc: Choose which repositories VEXLIT can access
onboarding.publicOnlyDesc: Scan only your public GitHub repositories
onboarding.allReposDesc: Include private repositories for comprehensive scanning
onboarding.automationDesc: Enable or disable features — you can change these later in Settings
onboarding.changeAnytime: You can change these settings anytime from the dashboard
onboarding.prCheckDesc: Automatically scan code when a pull request is created
onboarding.scheduledScanDesc: Run daily or weekly scans automatically
onboarding.securityAlertsDesc: Receive alerts in Slack, Discord, or email
onboarding.codeAnalysisDesc: AST-based vulnerability detection across your codebase

terms.codeAccessDesc: VEXLIT scans your code repositories for security vulnerabilities using static analysis. We access only the files and branches you explicitly authorize. Scan results are stored securely and associated with your account.
terms.dataProcessingDesc: Source code is processed in-memory during scanning and is not permanently stored beyond scan result metadata (file paths, line numbers, code snippets around vulnerabilities). Full source code is not retained after scan completion.
terms.aiDisclosureDesc: When you use AI-powered features (explanations, fix suggestions, reports), relevant code snippets may be sent to third-party AI providers (Anthropic) for processing. This data is not used for model training.
terms.retentionDesc: Scan results (vulnerability metadata, severity ratings, suggestions) are retained for the lifetime of your account. You may delete projects and associated scan data at any time.
terms.limitationsDesc: VEXLIT provides automated security scanning as a supplementary tool. It does not replace professional security audits. Results may contain false positives or miss certain vulnerability types.

privacy.infoCollectDesc: GitHub profile information (username, email, avatar), repository metadata (names, branches), and scan results. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.howWeUseDesc: To provide security scanning services, display scan results, generate reports, and send notifications about new vulnerabilities found in your code.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: We use Supabase (database/auth), Vercel (hosting), and Anthropic (AI features). Each service has their own privacy policy governing data they process.

docs.heroDescription: Install the VEXLIT CLI to scan locally, in CI/CD pipelines, or anywhere Node.js runs. 85+ SAST rules, 200+ secret detectors, zero configuration required.
docs.installDesc: Install globally with npm, or use npx to run without installing.
docs.commandsDesc: One command to scan. Flags to customize output format and behavior.
docs.outputDesc: Findings are grouped by severity with file location and rule ID.
docs.configDesc: Create a vexlit.config.js to disable rules, override severity, or ignore paths.
docs.cicdDesc: Add security scanning to your CI pipeline. SARIF results appear in the GitHub Security tab.
docs.apiDesc: Import the core engine directly in your Node.js scripts or tools.
docs.ctaDesc: Start scanning in seconds. No sign-up required for the CLI.
docs.exportSarif: Export SARIF for GitHub Security tab
